source_excerpt: costs of the total program are between $0.9 billion - $1.0 billion and is expected to be substantially completed by the end of fiscal year 2026.
notes: The source text matches the figures and hedged language in the claim, but the resolved filing period is 2025-12-31, not fiscal 2023 as the claim asserts. This is a citation/attribution mismatch — the claim attributes the disclosure to the fiscal 2023 annual report, while the resolved source is a filing for the period ending 2025-12-31.
